title: cardaria repens
intro: Cardaria repens, also known as wormwood or bur-cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cardaria repens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
